label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what the father did when he was laid off. The options are A to D. Let me look back at the passage. The son initially thinks his dad is joking when he says he was laid off. Then he notices the dad's expression and realizes it's true. The passage mentions that the dad was home all day, searching for jobs on the computer. The son notices how down he seems and how it affected his self-esteem, even though he tried to be optimistic. So, the father's reaction wasn't anger (A), because there's no mention of him being angry with his boss. He was clearly affected emotionally. Option B says he didn't care at all, which doesn't fit because he was looking for jobs and the son noticed he was down. Option D
